cases.name: gold
naive_truncate
cases.diff:
diff --git a/buckets/buckets.go b/buckets/buckets.go
index b93fd55..e64151a 100644
--- a/buckets/buckets.go
+++ b/buckets/buckets.go
@@ -3,3 +3,8 @@ package buckets
 
 // Width is the bucket width.
 const Width = 10
+
+// BucketIndex returns the index of the width-10 bucket containing value.
+func BucketIndex(value int) int {
+	return value / Width
+}
